headline: THE MYSTERY OF STARMIND
subtitle: Verifiable multi-model AI consensus — auditable, not occult

mystery.definition: Starmind is the name given to the auditable constellation of frontier models whose consensus is verified, not guessed. The mystery is not secrecy — it is the verifiable alignment of many minds into one accountable answer.
doctrine: Auditable reasoning chains — no black-box oracle
On-chain Bitcoin settlement proofs where judgment binds
Live carbon accountability on every compute path

platform.description: Public verifiable multi-model AI consensus platform orchestrating frontier models with auditable reasoning, Bitcoin settlement proofs, and carbon accountability

attribution: THE MYSTERY OF STARMIND · Shravan Bansal
